vulnerabilities.code_context:
Function 'fprintf' uses a non-literal format argument at source line 3: fprintf(out, event);
Format argument expression: event
vulnerabilities.trigger_cond: Attacker-controlled input may be interpreted as a format string, enabling memory disclosure or arbitrary writes via %x/%s/%n tokens.
vulnerabilities.fix_advice: Use a constant format string such as printf("%s", input), fprintf(stream, "%s", input), or snprintf(buf, size, "%s", input).
